entry.title: [SYD2][Infrastructure ] - Room S2-5X-02 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 29, 21:00 UTC  -  Jul 30, 07:00 UTC

May 19, 15:33 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 29/07/2026 21:00 UTC
End time : 30/07/2026 07:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, Some devices in the room S2-5X-02 will temporarily lose power redundancy. Single-powered devices connected may experience a brief power interruption while they are migrated to other power source.

Public network will be unavailable for approximately 30–45 minutes for the racks specified below :
S2-5X-02-05A
S2-5X-02-05B
S2-5X-02-08B
S2-5X-02-09B

IPMI (Intelligent Platform Management Interface) will be unavailable during the maintenance window for the racks specified bellow :
S2-5X-02-06B
S2-5X-02-07A
S2-5X-02-07B
S2-5X-02-08B
S2-5X-02-09B
S2-5X-02-10A

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [WAW1][Infrastructure] - Room W106 Electrical Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 18, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

May 12, 15:32 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Electrical Infrastructure in the Room W106.

Start time : 18/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 18/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified racks listed below may experience temporary IPMI unavailability during the operation, for a period of five minutes per rack.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in Room W106.

Thank you for your understanding.

End time : 18/06/2026 07:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, Some devices in the room S2-5X-01 will temporarily lose power redundancy. Single-powered devices connected may experience a brief power interruption while they are migrated to other power source.

Public network will be unavailable for approximately 30–45 minutes for the racks specified below :
S2-5X-01-08A
S2-5X-01-04A
S2-5X-01-04B

IPMI (Intelligent Platform Management Interface) will be unavailable during the maintenance window for the racks specified bellow :
S2-5X-01-04B
S2-5X-01-05B
S2-5X-01-06B
S2-5X-01-07B
S2-5X-01-08B

entry.title: [RBX/FRA/LIM/AMS/GRA][Network] - Backbone maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 27, 20:00 UTC  -  May 28, 04:00 UTC

May 19, 20:59 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our network infrastructure.

Start time : 27/05/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Customers will experience increased latency when accessing their services through RBX to FRA, LIM to AMS, and GRA to FRA.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, our teams will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [SBG5][Infrastructure] - Rack SBG0504A06C Electrical Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 27, 06:00 - 15:00 UTC

May 5, 13:08 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Electrical Infrastructure in rack SBG0504A06C.

Start time : 27/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in rack SBG0504A06C.

entry.title: [LIM1][Cooling System] - Rack L115A03 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 26, 07:00 - 09:00 UTC

Apr 30, 22:08 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 26/05/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 26/05/2026 09:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
